new_artifacts.title: Crypto-Agility Assessment Template
new_artifacts.purpose: PDF/XLSX template with crypto asset inventory fields, long-lived data flag, risk scoring, and migration priority.

new_artifacts.title: PQC Cloud & Workload Identity Migration Checklist
new_artifacts.purpose: Checklist covering certificates, workload identities, PKI, TLS/mTLS, token signing, key lifecycle, SaaS dependencies, and CISA 2026 category alignment.

new_artifacts.title: SCADA/ICS PQC Migration Continuity Checklist
new_artifacts.purpose: Safety-first OT/ICS/SCADA checklist covering latency, legacy gateways, maintenance windows, vendor dependencies, hybrid mode, rollback, and safety continuity.

sources.name: NIST FIPS 203 - Module-Lattice-Based Key-Encapsulation Mechanism Standard (ML-KEM)
sources.alignment: PQC key establishment/key encapsulation planning for TLS, VPN, API, and machine-to-machine trust dependencies.

sources.name: NIST FIPS 204 - Module-Lattice-Based Digital Signature Standard (ML-DSA)
sources.alignment: Digital signature migration planning for certificates, code signing, artifact signing, identity token signing, and PKI roadmaps.

sources.name: NIST FIPS 205 - Stateless Hash-Based Digital Signature Standard (SLH-DSA)
sources.alignment: Hash-based signature planning for conservative signature-use cases where size/performance tradeoffs are acceptable.

sources.name: NIST NCCoE Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography
sources.alignment: Cryptographic discovery, inventory, risk-prioritization, and interoperability-testing workflow.

sources.name: NIST CSWP 39 - Considerations for Achieving Crypto Agility
sources.alignment: Crypto-agility strategy, governance, algorithm/configuration abstraction, operational continuity, and lifecycle planning.

sources.name: CISA - Product Categories for Technologies That Use Post-Quantum Cryptography Standards
sources.alignment: 2026 product-category reference for PQC adoption, including cloud services, web software, and endpoint security categories.

sources.name: CISA/NSA/NIST - Quantum-Readiness: Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography
sources.alignment: Quantum-readiness roadmap, cryptographic inventory, vendor engagement, and supply-chain dependency assessment.

sources.name: CISA - Post-Quantum Considerations for Operational Technology
sources.alignment: OT/ICS/SCADA migration considerations for safety, performance, vendor dependency, and operational continuity.

sources.name: NIST SP 800-82 Rev. 3 - Guide to Operational Technology Security
sources.alignment: OT security planning that accounts for performance, reliability, safety, and physical process constraints.

sources.name: NIST SP 800-161 Rev. 1 Update 1 - Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management Practices
sources.alignment: Supplier roadmap, procurement, support-window tracking, and supply-chain risk-management evidence.

sources.name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0
sources.alignment: Govern, Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond, and Recover framing for migration governance and risk communication.

disclaimer: Independent vendor-neutral planning aid; not a NIST, CISA, or government publication or endorsement.
